name: 4-Day S — Full Split
_note: Advanced athlete: the full 4-day split as designed (spec §5: S is essentially the full split).

name: 3-Day A — Speed & Power
_note: Proficient athlete: max-velocity, plyo-density/single-leg, and lateral/rotational power.

name: 3-Day B — Developing
_note: Developing athlete: same 3-day structure as A (tier governs content/dose, not day count). Reasoned default — tune the day count if a developing athlete needs more recovery.

name: 2-Day C — Foundation
_note: Foundational athlete: an upper/lower-balanced pair (lower+speed, upper+plyo).
